prose:
**Furan Fukui reactivity descriptors** — DFT (PySCF), tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals; no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: taken directly from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (user-supplied .xyz; single-point, no geometry relaxation at DFT). SCF converged cleanly; integrity.trustworthy = true; no warnings reported. Mulliken partial-charge scheme was used. The electrophilic Fukui function f⁺ peaks at atom 5 (carbon, index 4, 1-based label 5) with f⁺ = 1.9242931; the nucleophilic Fukui function f⁻ also peaks at the same atom with f⁻ = 0.1616371.
Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui \
  --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp \
  --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmptdl_hquv/live.json
```
